vocab.meaning: những ngọn đồi nhấp nhô gợn sóng
vocab.example: I've always dreamed of trekking across the undulating hills of Tuscany to admire the rolling landscape.
For me, a long walk is the perfect excuse for some urban exploration through the hidden alleys of London.
I would relish a solitary stroll along a mist-covered lake to clear my head and gather my thoughts.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh đẹp như tranh vẽ
vocab.example: The most compelling reason to walk through the Swiss Alps is the chance to witness such picturesque scenery firsthand.

vocab.meaning: những con phố ngoằn ngoèo như mê cung
vocab.example: If I had the chance, I’d spend an entire day navigating the labyrinthine streets of the old quarter in Hanoi.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị che chắn/gián đoạn
vocab.example: Walking along the Great Wall of China offers uninterrupted views of the mountain ridges stretching into the distance.
I gravitate towards a serene environment, such as a botanical garden, for a long walk to escape the city noise.
A trek along a rugged coastal path would be ideal for feeling the raw power of the ocean breeze.

vocab.meaning: chuyến đi bộ đường dài tốn nhiều sức lực
vocab.example: I wouldn't mind a strenuous hike up to Machu Picchu, as the historical significance makes the effort worthwhile.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí sôi động/náo nhiệt
vocab.example: I’d love to take a long walk through New York City at night just to soak in the vibrant atmosphere and neon lights.
